nasb.text: And when they heard that he was addressing them in the Hebrew dialect, they became even more quiet; and he *said,

esv.text: And when they heard that he was addressing them in the Hebrew language, they became even more quiet. And he said:

cnv.text: 他們聽見保羅用希伯來語說話，就更加安靜了。保羅說：

ccb.text: 在场的人听见保罗讲的是希伯来话，更加安静了。保罗说：

csbs.text: 众人听见他用希伯来语向他们呼吁，就更加安静了。保罗说：
